summary: See clues file for full details. 4 tossups, 6 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 4 tossups and 6 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: A member of this family had the exterior of a building and the loggia across the street decorated with his trademark symbol of a sail blowing in the wind. 30 marble squares are inlaid in a funerary chapel named for this family in the San Pancrazio.
examples: A member of this family had the exterior of a building and the loggia across the street decorated with his trademark symbol of a sail blowing in the wind. 30 marble squares are inlaid in a funerary chapel named for this family in the San Pancrazio.

clues.clue: An artwork that is [emphasize] actually named for this family is "carried in procession" in a painting by Frederic Leighton, but is incorrectly attributed in the painting's title.
examples: An artwork that is [emphasize] actually named for this family is "carried in procession" in a painting by Frederic Leighton, but is incorrectly attributed in the painting's title.

clues.clue: A patron from this family commissioned the white marble facade of the Santa Maria Novella from Leon Battista Alberti, who designed a (*) palazzo named for this family of wool merchants.
examples: A patron from this family commissioned the white marble facade of the Santa Maria Novella from Leon Battista Alberti, who designed a (*) palazzo named for this family of wool merchants.

clues.clue: A panel painting named for this family uses gold leaf and egg tempera to depict three angels on either side of the Virgin and Child and was made in 1285 in Siena.
examples: A panel painting named for this family uses gold leaf and egg tempera to depict three angels on either side of the Virgin and Child and was made in 1285 in Siena.

clues.clue: An egg hanging above a figure who is in this position inspired Salvador Dali to interpret that figure with a rectangular hole for a chest.
examples: An egg hanging above a figure who is in this position inspired Salvador Dali to interpret that figure with a rectangular hole for a chest.

clues.clue: An armor-clad Federico da Montefeltro kneels before a figure in this position in that sacra conversazione by Piero della Francesca.
examples: An armor-clad Federico da Montefeltro kneels before a figure in this position in that sacra conversazione by Piero della Francesca.

clues.clue: Simone Martini painted a red and blue canopy above a central figure in this position.
examples: Simone Martini painted a red and blue canopy above a central figure in this position.

clues.clue: This positioning of a figure is emphasized with liberal use of gold striations on a blue robe to create depth in a (*) Cimabue  painting.
examples: This positioning of a figure is emphasized with liberal use of gold striations on a blue robe to create depth in a (*) Cimabue  painting.

clues.clue: Giotto neglected that technique for chiaroscuro in the Ognissanti Madonna.
examples: Giotto neglected that technique for chiaroscuro in the Ognissanti Madonna.

clues.clue: While holding the infant Jesus, a madonna in this position forms the Maesta scene.
examples: While holding the infant Jesus, a madonna in this position forms the Maesta scene.

clues.clue: The only work by this artist in the National Gallery in London was acquired by the government in 2000 in lieu of taxes and was originally part of a diptych that included a depiction of the Flagellation that is now in the Frick collection.
examples: The only work by this artist in the National Gallery in London was acquired by the government in 2000 in lieu of taxes and was originally part of a diptych that included a depiction of the Flagellation that is now in the Frick collection.
